title: 24:33 芒聙聰 September 11, 2024
body_text:
24:33 芒聙聰 September 11, 2024
Update to Wires Data Extract Service File Specifications, Form 9327
We made the following changes to the Wires Data Extract Service File Specifications, Form 9327.
Document Library
Status
Wires Data Extract Service File Specifications
9327
Chapter 4, Wires Data Extract Field Specifications
We updated the third column label from 芒聙聹Format芒聙聺 to 芒聙聹Contents芒聙聺.
We also made the following changes:

Updated 芒聙聹LVTS芒聙聺 to 芒聙聹LYNX芒聙聺
